title: ctenium longiglume
intro: Ctenium longiglume, also known as Guinea grass or big cord grass, is a type of tropical grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ctenium longiglume include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ctenium longiglume typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various health conditions.
